review: Terrible app, fails most of the time and almost no specials, so we switched to other options
App fails to process online payment. what's the point if you can't get payment to work?

Horrendus customer service. I placed a delivery order, and the delivery driver did not complete the order, and when I called support they refused a refund with no given reason. I asked to speak to a supervisor and they said there isn't one available. Will be contacting my bank to report fraud and charge back the amount stolen, and will no longer be eating at this restaurant in the future.
